account.title: Account
account.description: Represents a team-managed account with credentials.

gmail.description: The Gmail address of the account.

twoFactor.description: The 2FA code or secret for the account.

status.description: The current status of the account.

createdBy.description: The username of the team member who created the account.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the account was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the account was last updated.

user.title: User
user.description: Represents a team member with access to the dashboard.

username.description: The unique username for the team member.

email.description: The email address associated with the user account.
